description_long: This is a single-story modern house surrounded by a rectangular yard enclosed with a hedge or low wall. The house features a flat roof and a layout with multiple rooms, visible through the open roof design. The exterior walls are a mix of light beige and brown tones, with large windows and sliding doors providing access to the outdoor areas. The property includes a driveway, a paved area, and landscaped sections with trees and shrubs. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the open roof, room layout, and the driveway on the left.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the front, emphasizing the main entryway, paved driveway, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs in the yard.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, with a clear view of the backyard, garden, and the back wall of the property.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the house from the opposite side, focusing on the long facade with large windows and the open garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a paved approach, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
